payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded by mem_new. Under strict recall rules, superseded memories are not shown as current facts, even if they otherwise match the query.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because mem_old was marked superseded by the newer memory covering the same subject/entity relationship.

entity_resolution.reason: Both memories refer to the same person, Sam, and the recall path evaluated competing memories tied to that resolved entity.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected because it is the current durable memory for Sam associated with Goldman.
mem_old was excluded because it is superseded and therefore should not be presented as current during recall.

details: Found current memory mem_new linked to Goldman.
Found older competing memory mem_old for the same subject/context.
Applied supersession filtering, excluding mem_old from current recall output.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded_by link to mem_new.
If both memories should remain retrievable, mark mem_old as historical rather than current and adjust recall mode to include history.
Check timestamp or version ordering if the supersession edge was inferred rather than explicitly stored.
Confirm Sam entity resolution is correct and that both memories were attached to the same entity.

Under strict recall rules, superseded memories are not shown as current facts, even if they otherwise match the query.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded_by link to mem_new.","If both memories should remain retrievable, mark mem_old as historical rather than current and adjust recall mode to include history.","Check timestamp or version ordering if the supersession edge was inferred rather than explicitly stored.","Confirm Sam entity resolution is correct and that both memories were attached to the same entity."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Matched query target: Sam.","Found current memory mem_new linked to Goldman.","Found older competing memory mem_old for the same subject/context.","Applied supersession filtering, excluding mem_old from current recall output."]}}
